name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-2
title: Unify CLI naming: rename --no-human-approval to --human-approval-gate, true/false for booleans, positive-streamlined names
description:
Three coordinated changes to unify CLI naming style across the rabbit workflow:

1. RENAME --no-human-approval → --human-approval-gate (tdd-subagent)
   Current: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py accepts --no-human-approval (a negated boolean flag with no value)
   New: --human-approval-gate true|false
     - true  = gate is active (default); subagent waits for in-conversation approval at HUMAN-APPROVAL step
     - false = gate is bypassed; HUMAN-APPROVAL step is skipped
   Callers: rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md (Step 4 bypass path), any dispatch site that passes --no-human-approval

2. UNIFY /rabbit-config human-approval subcommand values (rabbit-cage)
   Current: /rabbit-config human-approval bypass|gated (semantic verbs)
   New: /rabbit-config human-approval false|true
     - false = bypass (gate disabled, marker written)
     - true  = gate active (marker removed)
     - no-arg = print current state as "true" or "false"
   The .rabbit-human-approval-bypass marker semantics do not change; only the CLI surface does.

3. ADD naming convention to contract feature (contract)
   Add a rule to the contract's naming-convention policy or hard-rules doc:
   a. Boolean CLI flags and subcommand values use true/false exclusively. Not enabled/disabled, not on/off, not lock/unlock for boolean states, not negated flag forms like --no-X.
   b. Variable and flag names must be "positive streamlined": name what you are enabling, not what you are disabling.
      PREFER: --human-approval-gate, --enable-review, bypass-human-approval
      AVOID:  --no-human-approval, --disable-review, --skip-review
      Rule: if a flag or variable describes an absence or negation in its name, rename it to describe what IS present when the flag is active.

Cross-feature impact: tdd-subagent (dispatch script + SKILL.md + tests), rabbit-cage (rabbit-config script + spec + tests), contract (naming-convention doc or hard-rules).

history.note: TDD cycle complete. CLI Naming Convention added to contract spec (Inv 15/16). --no-human-approval renamed to --human-approval-gate true|false in dispatch-tdd-subagent.py and SKILL.md. /rabbit-config human-approval bypass|gated renamed to true|false. All legacy values hard-rejected. 3 parallel TDD cycles, all green.
